---
title: "DATASCI 350 – Quiz 02"


---

## Welcome

The Gapminder dataset contains country-level data on life expectancy, GDP per capita, and population over time.

### Website Pages

- [Life Expectancy and GDP per Capita](life-gdp.qmd)
- [Life Expectancy and Population](life-population.qmd)
- [Country Analysis](country.qmd)
